description: User asks about Jummah at Markazi, follows up with Asr, switches to Jamia Dewsbury for Maghrib and Isha

messages.content: What time is Jummah today at Markazi?

Jummah at Jame Masjid today:
- Khutbah starts: [time]
- Jama'ah: [time]

Get there early if you can — it fills up quick on Fridays.

Asr at Jame Masjid today:
- Begins: [time]
- Jama'ah: [time]
What about at Jamia mosque in Dewsbury?

Asr at Madni Jamia Masjid today:
- Jama'ah: [time]

Maghrib at Madni Jamia Masjid today:
- Jama'ah: [time]

Do you want Isha as well while you're planning?

Isha at Madni Jamia Masjid today:
- Jama'ah: [time]

You're sorted for the day now 👍
